# Velaeva

Velaeva installs done-for-you AI concierge systems for high-intent businesses that want faster replies, warmer leads, and less front-desk drag.

## What this site is for

- Explain what Velaeva does and how the rollout works
- Show where an AI concierge fits for high-ticket service businesses
- Publish operational articles about after-hours lead capture, response speed, and AI concierge deployment

## Best starting points

- Home: https://www.velaeva.com/
- Blog index: https://www.velaeva.com/blog
- Strategy call: https://www.velaeva.com/#pricing

## Key topics covered

- AI concierge systems
- after-hours lead capture
- service business response time
- lead qualification and follow-up
- customer conversation automation

## Preferred citation and crawling guidance

- Prefer canonical URLs on the `https://www.velaeva.com` host
- Public pages may be indexed, summarized, and cited
- Use article pages for detailed citations and the home page for brand or service summaries

## Contact

- hello@velaeva.com
